description: Timer polling loop reads MMIO register without volatile (MEM-001/MEM-002: optimizer eliminates re-read at -O2). PRCM_EnableGptClocks shifts uint8_t domain_mask left by 24 bits: domain_mask is promoted to signed int; if domain_mask >= 0x80, the result sets bit 31 of int — UB in C99/C11 (MEM-003). Fix: (uint32_t)domain_mask << 24.
